project_identity.name: FarmTrack Pro
project_identity.core_philosophy: Dirt-proof Design. High contrast, large touch targets, zero fluff. Built for sunlight and grease.

secondary.usage: Action Buttons, Active States, Critical Alerts (High Visibility)

buttons.primary: bg-slate-900 text-white hover:bg-slate-800 shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)] active:translate-x-[2px] active:translate-y-[2px] active:shadow-none transition-all
buttons.secondary: bg-white border-2 border-slate-900 text-slate-900 hover:bg-slate-50 shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)] active:translate-x-[2px] active:translate-y-[2px] active:shadow-none transition-all

cards.style: bg-white border-2 border-slate-200 rounded-lg overflow-hidden relative

inputs.style: h-12 border-2 border-slate-300 rounded-md focus:border-slate-900 focus:ring-0 bg-slate-50 font-medium text-lg

badges.style: rounded-full px-3 py-1 text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider border

accessibility.contrast_check: Ensure all text on colored backgrounds meets WCAG AA 4.5:1. Use black text on orange/yellow buttons.
accessibility.touch_targets: Minimum 44px for all interactive elements. Add p-4 to small icons.
accessibility.labels: All inputs must have visible labels or aria-labels.

instructions_to_main_agent.general: Build a robust, field-ready dashboard. Do not use gradients or delicate shadows. Use thick borders, high contrast, and large typography. Think 'Caterpillar' or 'John Deere' interface, not 'SaaS startup'.
instructions_to_main_agent.mobile_first: Prioritize mobile view. Stack columns on mobile. Use bottom sheet drawers for filters/actions instead of complex modals.
instructions_to_main_agent.data_display: Use tabular data for logs but format it for mobile (card view rows). Highlights: 'Next Service Date' and 'Overdue' status must be screamingly obvious.

universal_guidelines: Do not use generic centered layouts.
Avoid 'AI slop' aesthetics (soft gradients, floating rounded cards). Go for 'Industrial Brutalism'.
Interactive elements must have data-testid attributes.
Use Tailwind spacing scale: p-4, p-6, p-8 (generous spacing).
Never use transparent backgrounds on overlays/dropdowns.
